title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Vedanta Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Vedanta Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Vedanta Capital India in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vedanta Capital India:
Vedanta Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta Capital India!
